data.body: CHECKPOINT 1/6: Gate evaluation complete. Gate 2 (User Impact): PASS — .claude/commands/ wrappers change invocation behavior; portability lint affects developer workflow. Gate 3 (Architectural): PASS — shim sentinel self-detection is a new plugin resolution mechanism; portability lint is new enforcement layer. Gate 4 (Constraint): PASS — shim resolution order and portability-ok suppression are new naming conventions requiring CLAUDE.md update. Agent fallback directive already present on line 87 (no duplicate needed). No unexempted /Users/ paths found in CLAUDE.md or WORKTREE-GUIDE.md. Proceeding to draft documentation changes.
